Font Families

  • values

    Body Text

    Magna laboris exercitation excepteur est laboris culpa duis elit labore do aliquip. Ullamco magna veniam magna minim magna fugiat aliqua veniam consequat. Laboris in cupidatat excepteur. Nostrud labore sunt tempor deserunt dolor laborum deserunt eiusmod. Exercitation sint culpa sit veniam ullamco non. Reprehenderit adipisicing consequat reprehenderit magna aliquip duis nostrud Lorem et in velit proident ut do aliqua. Deserunt duis laborum ipsum. Deserunt fugiat culpa reprehenderit ullamco.

    Id aliqua aute sunt dolor id id reprehenderit. Qui excepteur labore reprehenderit ex voluptate excepteur id magna aliqua cillum voluptate eu eiusmod. Qui anim adipisicing laborum laborum. Sit deserunt qui pariatur excepteur. Dolor esse nostrud veniam qui commodo ea. Laboris laboris eiusmod culpa non aliqua minim consequat exercitation ullamco nostrud commodo qui nulla.

    Ullamco consectetur amet nisi eu in esse nulla ullamco minim mollit eiusmod anim. Sint cupidatat veniam eiusmod exercitation elit ut nostrud nisi deserunt ut in. Exercitation ut pariatur reprehenderit non elit esse sunt elit duis exercitation. Deserunt Lorem pariatur incididunt ipsum mollit qui non reprehenderit.

    Headings

    Heading 1

    Heading 2

    Heading 3

    Heading 4

    Text Sizes

      Leading

        Text Format

        _fontFamily
        • Any valid font family name installed or available in Figma.
        • Examples: 'Roboto', 'Arial', 'Big Shoulders Display'
        _fontPostScriptName
        • null if not applicable.
        • Valid PostScript name strings of the font.
        • Examples: 'Roboto-Regular', 'Arial-BoldMT'
        _fontWeight
        • 100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600, 700, 800, 900
        • Corresponds to lightness and boldness of the font.
        _fontSize
        • Any positive number representing font size in pixels.
        • Typically ranges from 8 to 200 pixels, depending on design requirements.
        _textAlignHorizontal
        • 'LEFT'
        • 'CENTER'
        • 'RIGHT'
        • 'JUSTIFIED'
        • 'AUTO'
        _textAlignVertical
        • 'TOP'
        • 'CENTER'
        • 'BOTTOM'
        • 'BASELINE'
        _letterSpacing
        • Any numerical value (positive, negative, or zero) representing letter spacing in pixels.
        • Example: -1.2 px means letters are 1.2 pixels closer together.
        _lineHeightPx
        • Any positive number representing line height in pixels.
        • Typically adjusted based on font size for optimal readability.
        _lineHeightPercent
        • Any positive number representing line height as a percentage of the font size.
        • Common values range from 100% to 200%, depending on design needs.
        _lineHeightUnit
        • INTRINSIC_PX
        • INTRINSIC_%
        • EXTRINSIC_PX
        • EXTRINSIC_%
        _name
        • Any string identifier for the text format.
        • Used for referencing within styles or components.
        • Example: 'fontFamily/display'
        _id
        • Unique string identifier assigned by Figma.
